HGSS.407.0002:
Mary: We’re reaching out to all you
Pokémon fans out there! Here is the
leading expert on Pokémon, Professor
Oak, and of course myself, Mary!
HGSS.407.0004:
Professor Oak: [0100,0001,0000] may be
seen around [0104,0000,0000]!
HGSS.407.0007: So many it’ll seem like a dream
HGSS.407.0008: There’s no reason for it, but
HGSS.407.0010: Whether you see them above or below,
HGSS.407.0011: If one walks with you as a companion
HGSS.407.0012: If you just try calling out its name
HGSS.407.0013: If you look at it from a different angle
HGSS.407.0015: You won’t be able to resist
HGSS.407.0017: If you lightly poke it and see,
HGSS.407.0019: you won’t be able to stop laughing!
HGSS.407.0022: you won’t be able to look away.
HGSS.407.0024: you’ll be able to make a great friend!
HGSS.407.0026: it will never cease to amaze you!
HGSS.407.0031: you’ll think that’s one typical Pokémon.
HGSS.407.0032:

A bunch of [0100,0001,0000] have decided to
make an appearance at
[0104,0000,0000]! If you’re a Trainer
who’s really wanted to find [0100,0001,0000],
